scripts.generate:openapi: pnpm --filter @netstamp/api generate:openapi && cp docs/public/openapi.json server/internal/controller/transport/http/openapi/openapi.json && pnpm --filter @netstamp/web generate:api-types && pnpm exec prettier --write docs/public/openapi.json server/internal/controller/transport/http/openapi/openapi.json web/src/shared/api/openapi.d.ts
scripts.prepare: sh -c 'command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -d .git ] && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || exit 0'
